executives.name: Marc Bell
executives.background: Marc Bell is the Co-Founder, Chairman, and Chief Executive Officer of Terran Orbital. He has over 30 years of experience in the technology and aerospace industries. Prior to Terran Orbital, he was the founder and CEO of Globix Corporation and has been involved in numerous high-growth ventures.

executives.name: Mathieu Riffel
executives.background: Mathieu Riffel serves as the Chief Financial Officer of Terran Orbital. He previously served as the company's Vice President of Finance and has extensive experience in financial planning and analysis within the aerospace sector.

executives.name: Hilary Hageman
executives.background: Hilary Hageman is the General Counsel and Corporate Secretary. She has over 20 years of legal experience, including roles at Cubic Corporation and CACI International, specializing in government contracting and corporate governance.

board_of_directors.name: Marc Bell
board_of_directors.background: Co-Founder, Chairman, and CEO of Terran Orbital Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Anthony Previte
board_of_directors.background: Co-Founder of Terran Orbital and former CEO of Tyvak Nano-Satellite Systems. He has extensive experience in satellite manufacturing and operations.

board_of_directors.name: James LaChance
board_of_directors.background: Founder and CEO of Discovery Capital Management. He has over 25 years of experience in investment management and corporate restructuring.

board_of_directors.name: Stratton Sclavos
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of VeriSign, Inc. He is a seasoned executive with experience in cybersecurity and technology infrastructure.

board_of_directors.name: Tobi Petrocelli
board_of_directors.background: Director of Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Strategy at Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group. Expert in corporate sustainability and governance.

sources.source_description: Form 10-K Annual Report for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
